strategy.char_limit_note: 200 characters is an absolute hard limit on LinkedIn free accounts. Count every character including spaces, punctuation, and the name at the start. Test in a notepad before sending.
strategy.tone: slightly awkward genuine observation — the kind a real person makes when they noticed something but are not sure how to say it. Stands out from polished AI slop by being specific and slightly imperfect.
anti_patterns: Do not use 'I came across your profile'
Do not use 'I was impressed by'
Do not use 'I noticed your impressive work'
Do not mention AI or automation
Do not pitch in the note — curiosity and connection only
Do not use 'reach out', 'touch base', or 'synergies'
Do not mention 'digital marketing', 'web design', 'SEO', or 'website' explicitly
Do not reference the email outreach — treat as a cold connection from someone who noticed their business
Do not reference the call that Claire booked (lead 3) — treat as first contact
Do not use generic 'I love what you do' phrases
Do not start with 'I' — start with the person's name or business
what_works: Start with their name — feels personal, cuts through
Name the specific business — shows you looked, not just searched
One specific observation — not vague, not flattering, just real
End with low-pressure framing ('in case it's useful', 'connecting in case relevant')
Slightly awkward construction is fine — it reads human
strategy.priority_upgrade_rule: HANDS: always check LinkedIn profile for posts from the last 60 days BEFORE sending any note. If post found: write bespoke post_reference note (3-4x higher acceptance rate). If no recent posts: use generic note below. MANDATORY for warm pipeline leads.
strategy.warm_pipeline_note_rule: Notes for leads 1/3/22 must NOT reference the email sequence, campaign, website audit, call, or any prior contact. Treat as a cold LinkedIn connection from someone who noticed their business through general research.
strategy.presumed_lost_framing: These leads are PRESUMED_LOST_NO_RESPONSE. The note is a soft, no-pressure connection — not a follow-up. If they connect and message, respond naturally. Do NOT immediately pitch.
strategy.post_reference_priority: Claire (lead 3) > Rob (lead 22) > Tom (lead 1) — by LinkedIn sector activity likelihood.
